Invest in sugar, food FMCGs, banks, information technology which will give good

Metals, steel and petrol will be less than average.
Stocks like GAMON INDIA will do really well. All infra structures and engineering

6. WILL THE SENSEX REACH 11,000. - 03/02/2006 10.07 AM PREDICTION CAME
TRUE

Many are skeptical and they feel the market is over heated. It can sustain this level
there can be crash. India is running one of the best bhukthi. It is running the period
of mercury in the main period of Venus.
The chart of the formation of the nifty shows the dasa of Saturn.
